title: Kuma group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''Kuma''''' was a squadron of three [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] during his attempted coup d'état.

They were at a supply depot in the [[Gwar system/Legends|Gwar system]] where the first and the third were destroyed firstly then the second by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
